evidence.title: Health Benefits of Exercise - PMC
extracted_claims: Lifelong exercise is associated with a longer health span, delaying the onset of 40 chronic conditions/diseases.
Molecular mechanisms are being learned regarding how exercise sustains and improves health.

evidence.title: 15 Science-Backed Benefits of Daily Exercise
extracted_claims: There are fifteen science-backed benefits associated with daily exercise.

evidence.title: Exercise induces whole-body health benefits
extracted_claims: Latest research confirms the benefits of sitting less and moving more.
Movement is emphasized as important for the body's health.

evidence.title: Importance of Exercise: Benefits & Recommended Types - Harvard Health
extracted_claims: Physical activity is categorized into four broad types (e.g., aerobic exercise).
Aerobic exercise plays a role in increasing heart rate.

evidence.title: Benefits of Physical Activity | Physical Activity Basics | CDC
extracted_claims: Physical activity benefits brain health (improved thinking, reduced anxiety).
Physical activity helps keep thinking and judgment skills sharp.
Physical activity reduces the risk of depression.

evidence.title: Health Benefits of Exercise and Physical Activity
extracted_claims: Regular exercise and physical activity offer health benefits.
It is important to get more active throughout the day to gain these benefits.
